---
title: "Contact"
subtitle: "Get in touch"
description-meta: "Contact information for Sivalingam S M"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
page-layout: article
---


Thank you for visiting my website.

I welcome inquiries regarding **research collaborations**, **student supervision**, **academic visits**, **seminars**, **conference organization**, **research funding proposals**, and **consultancy** in my areas of expertise.

Please feel free to contact me using the information below.

---

## Office

**Dr. Sivalingam S M**

Assistant Professor

Department of Mathematics

National Institute of Technology Warangal

Warangal – 506004

Telangana, India

---

## Email

| **Official** | **Personal** |
|---------|------|
| 📧 sivalingam@nitw.ac.in | 📧 siva915544@gmail.com |


## Research Areas

I am interested in collaborations involving

- Scientific Machine Learning
- Physics-Informed Neural Networks
- Neural Differential Equations
- Fractional Calculus
- Fractional Differential Equations
- Control Theory
- Model Predictive Control
- Dynamical Systems
- Numerical Analysis
- Scientific Computing
- Stochastic Differential Equations

---

## Academic Profiles

| Profile | Link |
|---------|------|
| Google Scholar | https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ezCkT1QAAAAJ&hl=en |
| ORCID | https://orcid.org/0000-0003-0818-9007 |
| ResearchGate | https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Sivalingam-S-M |
| GitHub | https://github.com/SivalingamSM |

---

## Prospective Students

I welcome enthusiastic students interested in pursuing research in

- Scientific Machine Learning
- Control Theory
- Applied Mathematics
- Fractional Calculus
- Numerical Analysis
- Scientific Computing

Prospective students are encouraged to send an email containing

- Curriculum Vitae (CV)
- Academic transcripts
- Brief statement of research interests
- Programming experience (if any)

---

## Collaborations

I am open to academic collaborations with researchers from universities, research institutes, and industry.

Potential collaboration topics include

- AI for Science
- Learning-based Control
- Neural Differential Equations
- Physics-Informed Machine Learning
- Scientific Computing
- Mathematical Modelling
- High-Performance Computing
- Applied Mathematics

---

## Office Hours

Please contact me by email to schedule an appointment.

---

> **I typically respond to emails within 2–3 working days.**
